items.name: Hash Photon Inference Server
items.description: A 2U inference beast optimized for low-latency LLM serving. Eight NVIDIA L40S GPUs with FP8 acceleration, dual 100GbE, and sub-millisecond token-streaming latency for SaaS-grade AI products.

specs.AI_UseCase: LLM inference, RAG, production model serving

items.name: Hash Stratos Aerial Survey Drone
items.description: A high-altitude AI survey drone for mapping, agriculture, and infrastructure inspection. On-device CV models fuse dual-camera gimbal data with LiDAR and hyperspectral imaging — 90-minute flight time per charge.

items.name: Hash Hornet Swarm Drone Kit
items.description: A ten-unit palm-sized swarm platform with decentralized AI mesh autonomy. Each micro-drone coordinates via low-latency LoRa-AI fabric — ideal for entertainment, research, and tactical swarm ops.

specs.AI_UseCase: Swarm robotics, light shows, decentralized autonomy research

items.name: Hash Nimbus Racing Drone
items.description: A featherweight FPV racing drone with sub-millisecond AI-stabilized flight control. 6S carbon frame, 4K HDR low-latency transmission, and an onboard cinematic AI mode for creators.

specs.AI_UseCase: Cinematic FPV, racing competitions, creator content
